channel.title: Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings

item.title: GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
item.description: GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-5-instant

item.title: How OpenAI delivers low-latency voice AI at scale
item.description: How OpenAI rebuilt its WebRTC stack to power real-time Voice AI with low latency, global scale, and seamless conversational turn-taking. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/delivering-low-latency-voice-ai-at-scale

item.title: Introducing Advanced Account Security
item.description: Introducing Advanced Account Security: phishing-resistant login, stronger recovery, and enhanced protections to safeguard sensitive data and prevent account takeover. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/advanced-account-security

item.title: Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
item.description: OpenAI scales Stargate to build the compute infrastructure powering AGI, adding new data center capacity to meet growing AI demand. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/building-the-compute-infrastructure-for-the-intelligence-age

item.title: Cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age
item.description: OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/cybersecurity-in-the-intelligence-age

item.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
item.description: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/openai-on-aws
